introduction: Persistent penile erection that continues beyond, or is not related to sexual stimulation

features: Persistent painful erection lasting several hours
Penis is rigid and tender but the glans penis and corpus spongiosum are soft

goals: Increase venous drainage from the corpora cavernosa
Decrease arterial inflow in high flow priapism
drug: Intracavernosal injection of alpha adrenergic agonist: Phenylephrine testicle 250 - 500 μg
